# CGLineJoin

**Enumeration**

Junction types for stroked lines.

## Declaration

```swift
enum CGLineJoin
```

## Overview

A line join specifies how [doc://com.apple.coregraphics/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGContext/strokePath()] draws the junction between connected line segments. To set the line join style in a graphics context, you use the function [doc://com.apple.coregraphics/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGContext/setLineJoin(_:)].

## Constants

- **CGLineJoin.miter**
- **CGLineJoin.round**: A join with a rounded end. Core Graphics draws the line to extend beyond the endpoint of the path. The line ends with a semicircular arc with a radius of 1/2 the line’s width, centered on the endpoint.
- **CGLineJoin.bevel**: A join with a squared-off end. Core Graphics draws the line to extend beyond the endpoint of the path, for a distance of 1/2 the line’s width.

## Initializers

- **init(rawValue:)**

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
